The health benefits of Ramalina polyclada include its potential to exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine for treating various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Ramalina polyclada include polyphenolic compounds, such as usnic acid, which have been shown to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. Ramalina polyclada is commonly used to prepare herbal extracts and teas, as well as being incorporated into supplements, to leverage its potential health benefits.
